action.reasoning: Observation: Best AP=0.2513 with 60 epochs, peaked at epoch 27. Analysis: Overfitting is the main issue. Need stronger regularization. Decision: Add DropEdge, increase dropout, add attention pooling, train 40 epochs with early stopping patience=15. Also try 6 layers.
